testcase.name: testAssumeFalseEnvProp
testcase.system-out: further code will execute only if above assumption hold

testcase.name: testAssumingThat
testcase.system-out: perform below assertions only on the test env perform below assertions on all env

testcase.name: testAssumeTrueSaturday
